title: wynnmod
description: Wynncraft Utility Mod. General QoLs, Raid & Gambit features, Ability Tree Loadouts, Item and Menu Overlays, Commands for checking player and leaderboard statistics, & much more!
body:
### Wynncraft utilities for late & endgame players 

Command List: /wynnmod help\
Config menu: /wynnmod config

Discord: [Discord Invitation](https://discord.gg/zsH3nEr5uA)\
-> Bug reports, update notifications, suggestions and questions\
-> Features Documentation

## Dependency
- Fabric API

## Main Features
### Check out gallery for some feature examples!

### Raid
- Scan party members for their raid statistics on raid start
- Selected gambits overlay in raids
- Shiny Swap Reminder before raid completion
- Raid Session (Raid statistic tracker)
- Raid Streak (BETA)

|Gambit|Feature| 
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
|Glutton's Gambit|Buff taken count overlay in buff room|
|Maddening Mage's Gambit|Warn before misfiring spell|
|Farsighted's Gambit|Render an attack range circle & render color shader on mob|
|Myopic's Gambit|Render an attack range circle & render color shader on mob|

### UI
- Item Statistic Tooltip
- Customizable percentage tag color
- Item Overlay for Item Name and Overall Roll Percentage
- Trade Market price overlay
- Blacksmith repair overlay

### Ability Tree
- [Ability Tree Loadouts (Showcase video)](https://youtu.be/YZ9QxdCqHjQ)
- Auto Tree & Aspects Assign

### Combat
- Status Effect Tracker
- Acolyte Overlay
- Trickster Overlay
- Radiance Reminder

### Lootrun
- Lootrun Overlays
- Lootrun Beacons Overlay
- Warnings for challenge left and time left

### Profession
- Gathering Statistic Trackers
- Gathering Session

### Player
- Render players' ranks on nametags
- Customizable & hideable disguise tag

### Commands
- Show player's raid stats (/ri <player name>)
- Show player's wynncraft stats (/stats <player name>)
- Show wynncraft leaderboards in game (/leaderboard)
- Show a players leaderboard positions (/leaderboard find <player name>)
- Find Item Command

### Other
- Copy chat
- Repair Notification
- Hotkeys
- Party ping system
- Public party
- Mount Overlay
- Emojis

## Discord
[Invite Link](https://discord.gg/zsH3nEr5uA)\
Wynnmod Discord server for bug/issue reports, update notifications, suggestions and questions

There is also a Feature Documentaion
